title: Amphilophium frutescens

It belongs to the genus Amphilophium, which is a group of flowering plants native to Central and South America. intro: Amphilophium frutescens, also known as the "Brazilian angel's trumpet," is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
